Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm so nervous for some reason...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The others are here in the dorm too... I hope no one finds out I snuck you into my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Wait, I didn't mean it like that! Don't get the wrong idea, okay!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, right... I wanted to give you something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You know what it is, right? It's the strap from my cell phone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I got it at the opening ceremony for the Moonlight Bridge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's been my special keepsake for years now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Because my dad bought it for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I used to talk to the little charm attached to it when I was alone in my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Haha... You must think I'm nuts, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But ever since I got to know you, I've stopped talking to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Um, it means a lot to me, so I should explain why I'm giving it to you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari has professed her love for me,[n]and seems to want mine in return...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Lovers Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Cybele{f 0 1 27}, the earth mother![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Hey, when this is all over... Maybe we can spend some time together, just the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I-In fact... would it be all right if I jumped the gun a bit, and... took some of that time right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'm not ready to say goodnight yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a special evening with Yukari.[n]{f 1 1}
